2603.15916.title: Auto Researching, not hyperparameter tuning: Convergence Analysis of 10,000 Experiments
2603.15916.paper_summary: When LLM agents autonomously design ML experiments, do they perform genuine architecture search -- or do they default to hyperparameter tuning within a narrow region of the design space? We answer this question by analyzing 10,469 experiments executed by two LLM agents (Claude Opus and Gemini 2.5 Pro) across a combinatorial configuration space of 108,000 discrete cells for dashcam collision detection over 27 days. Through ANOVA decomposition, we find that \textbf{architectural choices explain 94\% of performance variance} ($F = 1324$, $η^2 = 0.94$), while hyperparameter variation within a fixed architecture explains only 6\%. Cross-task validation on a second collision dataset confirms this finding (75\% architecture-explained variance) with a \emph{different} winning backbone, confirming genuine architecture discovery. The agents' key contribution is discovering that V-JEPA\,2 video features with Zipformer temporal encoders achieve 0.9245 AP -- a configuration no human proposed -- and concentrating search on productive architectural regions: at $N = 50$, LLM-guided search reaches AP $= 0.985$ versus $0.965$ for from-scratch random search. Post-bugfix convergence follows a power law ($c = 0.11$, $R^2 = 0.93$); the low exponent reflects the cost of broad exploration, not inefficiency, since the LLM discovers qualitatively better regions than random or Bayesian baselines. We characterize multi-agent search dynamics via entropy cycles and Jensen--Shannon specialization, providing the first large-scale empirical framework for LLM-guided combinatorial ML experiment design.
2603.15916.paper_summary_zh: 當 LLM 代理自主設計 ML 實驗時，他們是否執行真正的架構搜尋——還是僅僅在設計空間的狹窄區域內進行超參數調整？我們通過分析兩個 LLM 代理（Claude Opus 和 Gemini 2.5 Pro）在 27 天內執行的 10,469 次實驗，來回答這個問題，這些實驗涵蓋了 108,000 個離散單元的組合配置空間，用於行車記錄儀碰撞檢測。通過 ANOVA 分解，我們發現 \textbf{架構選擇解釋了 94\% 的性能變異} ($F = 1324$, $η^2 = 0.94$)，而在固定架構內的超參數變化僅解釋了 6\%。在第二個碰撞數據集上的跨任務驗證確認了這一發現（75\% 的架構解釋變異），並且有一個 \emph{不同} 的獲勝主幹，確認了真正的架構發現。代理的主要貢獻是發現 V-JEPA\,2 視頻特徵與 Zipformer 時間編碼器的組合達到了 0.9245 AP——這是一個沒有任何人類提出的配置——並將搜尋集中在富有成效的架構區域：在 $N = 50$ 時，LLM 指導的搜尋達到了 AP $= 0.985$，而從零開始的隨機搜尋僅為 $0.965$。修正錯誤後的收斂遵循一個冪律 ($c = 0.11$, $R^2 = 0.93$)；低指數反映了廣泛探索的成本，而不是低效率，因為 LLM 發現的區域質量優於隨機或貝葉斯基準。我們通過熵循環和 Jensen--Shannon 專門化來描述多代理搜尋動態，提供了首個大規模實證框架，用於 LLM 指導的組合 ML 實驗設計。
2603.15916.author: Xiaoyi Li et.al.
